rice.name: Rice (चावल)
rice.water: Needs lots of water. Keep field flooded.
rice.key_tip: Transplant 25-day seedlings. Apply nitrogen in 3 parts.

wheat.name: Wheat (गेहूं)
wheat.water: 4-6 irrigations. First irrigation at 21 days is most important.
wheat.key_tip: Each week delay after Nov 15 loses about 50 kg per hectare.

cotton.name: Cotton (कपास)
cotton.sowing_time: April-May in North, June-July in South/Central
cotton.key_tip: Remove bollworm-infected bolls by hand. Install pheromone traps.

sugarcane.name: Sugarcane (गन्ना)
sugarcane.water: Needs lots of water. 1500-2500mm rainfall needed.
sugarcane.key_tip: Use 3-budded setts from disease-free plants. Apply 275:115:115 NPK.

maize.name: Maize (मक्का)
maize.water: Moderate. Critical at tasseling and grain filling.
maize.key_tip: Earthing up at 30-35 days prevents falling.

mustard.name: Mustard (सरसों)
mustard.key_tip: Watch for aphids. Spray Dimethoate if more than 5 per plant.

tomato.name: Tomato (टमाटर)
tomato.sowing_time: Varies by region. Main: October-November for Rabi.
tomato.key_tip: Stake plants for 20-30% more yield. Calcium spray prevents fruit rot.

potato.name: Potato (आलू)
potato.water: Moderate. Light, frequent irrigation. No waterlogging.
potato.key_tip: Earth up twice at 25 and 45 days. Use 40-50 gram seed tubers.

onion.name: Onion (प्याज)
onion.key_tip: Stop irrigation 15 days before harvest for better storage.

chickpea.name: Chickpea (चना)
chickpea.water: Low. Rainfed crop. 1-2 irrigations if no rain.
chickpea.key_tip: Pod borer is main pest. Spray Indoxacarb at flowering.
